sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (a Tuple(int, String), b Int32);
SELECT tupleElement(a, 1) - b AS result FROM test_tuples WHERE tupleElement(a, 2, 'default') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a, (SELECT sum(tupleElement(a, 1)) FROM test_tuples WHERE tupleElement(a, 2) = 'first') - b AS adjusted_value FROM test_tuples;
SELECT AVG(tupleElement(a, 1)) - MAX(b) AS boundary_check FROM test_tuples GROUP BY (tupleElement(a, 2));
SELECT tupleElement(a, 1, 0) - IFNULL(b, 0) AS adjusted FROM temp_tuples;
SELECT tupleElement(a, 2) AS name, SUM(b) AS total FROM temp_tuples GROUP BY name HAVING total > 20;
WITH (SELECT tupleElement(a, 2) FROM test_tuples) AS names SELECT COUNT() FROM temp_tuples WHERE tupleElement(a, 1) < (SELECT MIN(tupleElement(a, 1)) FROM test_tuples);
